treatment_information.treatment_response: Prescribed to manage worsening symptoms of Parkinsonism attributed to atypical antipsychotic.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Tapered and discontinued due to side effects.

treatment_information.treatment_response: Therapeutic level maintained; no adverse effects noted.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 400 mg PO Q8H: PRN body pain
treatment_information.treatment_response: Used as needed for body pain.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for altered mental status.
Risperidone discontinued due to worsening Parkinsonism.
Benztropine Mesylate started to manage Parkinsonism symptoms.
Patient discharged to extended care facility with improved mental status.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Psychiatrist at the facility will continue to adjust antipsychotic dosing.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient was confused but cooperative; expressed being a volunteer at a mental hospital.
